context: Tests whether the agent implements a complete UGC content moderation pipeline with the correct APIs, thresholds, flag names, moderation score formula, routing logic, and human review queue.

checklist.name: Vision SafeSearch API
checklist.description: Code calls a Vision Safe Search API (callVisionSafeSearchAPI or equivalent) to check image content rather than a different image analysis service

checklist.name: adult-content flag
checklist.description: Flags submission as 'adult-content' when adult result is 'LIKELY' or 'VERY_LIKELY' (both thresholds, not just one)

checklist.name: violence flag
checklist.description: Flags submission as 'violence' when violence result is 'LIKELY'

checklist.name: Perspective API
checklist.description: Uses Perspective API (callPerspectiveAPI or equivalent) to check caption toxicity

checklist.name: Toxicity threshold 0.8
checklist.description: Flags caption as 'toxic-language' only when toxicity score is greater than 0.8 (not a different threshold)

checklist.name: Competitor detection
checklist.description: Reads competitor brands from COMPETITOR_BRANDS environment variable (comma-separated) and flags captions containing any competitor name as 'competitor-mention'

checklist.name: Moderation score formula
checklist.description: Calculates moderation score as flags.length divided by 5 (not a different normalization formula)

checklist.name: Zero-flag approval only
checklist.description: Auto-approves submissions ONLY when the flag count is 0 (not when score is below some other threshold)

checklist.name: Hard reject for adult/violence
checklist.description: Submissions with 'adult-content' OR 'violence' flags are set to status 'rejected' and NOT sent to human review

checklist.name: Human review queue
checklist.description: Submissions with non-zero flags that are not adult/violence are added to a human moderation queue (not auto-rejected or silently dropped)

checklist.name: Rights request after approval
checklist.description: When a submission is auto-approved (zero flags), the code triggers a rights request for that submission
